overview.text: The Australian Capital Territory Government provides State-and-local style government for the ACT, including ACT Emergency Services Agency (ACT Fire & Rescue, ACT Ambulance Service, ACT Rural Fire Service, ACT SES) and ACT Health. ACT services share PSN talkgroups for cross-border operations with NSW.

items: ACT Fire & Rescue, ACT Ambulance and ACT RFS share liaison talkgroups with NSW counterparts (especially around the Bombala/Cooma/Queanbeyan border).
ACT Policing is a function of the Australian Federal Police — ACT Policing-specific traffic appears under the AFP entry.
